steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We're given that 1 leuga = 7,200 pedes. To convert 4.5 leugas to pedes, multiply by this conversion factor.

steps.title: Multiply to find the equivalent pedes
steps.content: The number of pedes equivalent to 4.5 leugas is: $$4.5 \times 7,200 = 32,400$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $32400$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $32400$.
